titlestmt.author: Compiled by P. McCray, J. O'Shea

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-20 00:11:07 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, drafts of articles, transcripts of interviews, photographs, audiotape.
did.abstract: The collection consists of Bush's personal papers and collected news articles. Subjects include AIDS, the Human Rights Campaign Fund, the National Gay Task Force, and the legislative and legal aspects of gay rights.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Larry Bush was the Washington D.C. correspondent for The Advocate. As a freelance writer and journalist, he published several articles in both gay and straight publications, conducted interviews, gave speeches, and published the Bush Report, which was concerned with gay political and cultural issues. He was also the Washington liaison for the National Gay Task Force.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of Bush's correspondence, drafts of articles, transcripts of interviews, photographs, and an audiotape. Also included are subject files, clippings, reports, and articles pertaining to gay liberation, politics, rights, social and cultural issues, and journalism. Subjects include AIDS, the Human Rights Campaign Fund, the National Gay Task Force, and the legislative and legal aspects of gay rights; there are files on individuals, government commissions, and numerous other gay and lesbian issues.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: The collection had little original organization. The materials were divided into two series: Larry Bush personal files, and an alphabetical subject file. More than half of the folder headings were assigned.

label.ref: Series I. Larry Bush Personal Papers

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Larry Bush. Papers, #7316. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Larry Bush Personal Papers
Notes, Handwritten and Typed; Drafts of Letters and Articles; Lists
Larry Bush Personal, Including Financial Papers, and Correspondence
Larry Bush Personal Documents, Photographs, Audiotape, Clippings, Certificates, Typescripts
Letters of Complaint Against Larry Bush re: Published Articles
Drafts of Articles, Interviews, and Other Writings; Handwritten and Typed
U.S. Navy vs. John Baskin - Legal Documents
International Association of Black and White Men Together (IABWMT/BWMT)
Civil Rights - Leadership Conference on Civil Rights (LCCR)
District of Columbia Sexual Assault Reform Act
Federal and District of Columbia Crime Codes
Fund for Human Dignity, Press Releases 1982-83
Gay Organizations - Political, District of Columbia
Gay Rights Coalition of Georgetown University Law Center, et al. v. Georgetown University et al. Legal Documents and Articles
Gay Rights National Lobby (GRNL) - Board of Directors
Gay Rights National Lobby (GRNL) - Press Releases 1981-82

Rev. B. Samuel Hart Nomination to U.S. Civil Rights Commission
Human Rights Campaign Fund (HRCF) - 1982 Tax Forms
Human Rights Campaign Fund (HRCF) - Jim Foster's 1982 Report

Lambda Legal Defense and Education Fund, Inc.
National Committee for an Effective Congress
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - International Association of Black and White Men Together 1983
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Press Releases prior to 1980
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Press Releases 1980-81
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Press Releases 1982-83
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Press Releases 1983
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Press Releases 1984
National Gay Task Force (NGTF) - Jack Campbell
Report - Interdepartmental Group on Unauthorized Disclosures of Classified Information
